inputs.shares_source: 97,557,962 common shares outstanding at March 31, 2026 (Q1 2026 10-Q cover page)
inputs.cash_source: Cash and cash equivalents $28.11M at March 31, 2026 (Q1 2026 10-Q balance sheet)
inputs.adj_ebitda_source: Consolidated Adjusted EBITDA $69.68M FY2025 (FY2025 10-K EBITDA reconciliation)
inputs.capex_source: FY2025 additions to property, plant and equipment $88.80M (FY2025 10-K cash flow statement)
inputs.cfo_source: FY2025 net cash used in operating activities $19.01M (FY2025 10-K cash flow statement)
inputs.fcf_source: Normalized owner cash [Assumption]: post-Conway ramp Adj EBITDA ~$75M less maintenance capex ~$30M less interest ~$50M on 97.6M shares; filing TTM owner cash remains negative
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence consolidated path uses forward normalized owner cash after scale-up costs roll off; current GAAP free cash flow is negative due to capex cycle and working capital.

bear.notes: Covenant pressure, green-coffee/tariff working-capital squeeze, Conway ramp delays; equity dilution or distressed refinancing

base.notes: Revenue growth continues, scale-up costs normalize, secured leverage stays inside amended covenant ladder; modest multiple on improving EBITDA

bull.notes: Conway facility fully utilized, liquid-extract mix expands margins, deleveraging from operating cash inflection

option_scan.label: Conway, Arkansas extract and RTD facility utilization
option_scan.notes: FY2025 Conway pre-production add-back $24.7M in Adjusted EBITDA reconciliation; scale-up operating costs $15.3M

option_scan.label: Liquid extracts and cold-brew product platform
option_scan.notes: Highest-growth product category cited in 10-K Business section; revenue already in Beverage Solutions segment

option_scan.label: SS&T green-coffee traceability and commodity contracts
option_scan.notes: SS&T revenue $280.5M FY2025; intersegment sales to Beverage Solutions

option_scan.label: Amended credit covenant relief through 2026
option_scan.notes: Secured net leverage 3.85x vs 5.50x max at 12/31/2025; relief period with step-downs

growth_explanation.mechanism: Conway facility commercialization and liquid-extract mix shift lift segment margins as scale-up costs roll off; Beverage Solutions revenue grew 37.8% FY2025.
growth_explanation.bear_change: Green-coffee price spike or tariff shock revives working-capital drain and delays margin recovery.
growth_explanation.bull_change: Faster Conway capacity sell-through plus capex normalization releases consolidated owner cash earlier than base.

items: Confirm latest covenant step-down schedule and liquidity outlook on next earnings call
Vicki: IR site returned zero PDFs; request investor presentation if dynamic site blocks harvest

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
